title: The Script Runs
description: First time autobattle is toggled on. Meta-aware, but gentle.

steps.text: The party did not attack the slime. The party's script attacked the slime. The slime did not notice the distinction. The slime is, in this respect, the most consistent member of the encounter.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Delegation. Someone else decides which button we press. And we stand here.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: I was standing here anyway. This is not new.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: It is faster. The decisions are instant.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: Are we still playing, or are we being played?

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: That is not an answer to the question I asked.

steps.text: The script ran. The slime died. The next slime was already forming.
